'''鈭歵-s-ch-r''' ('''katascheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mainswear|mainswear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mainswear|mainswear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-s-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| katascheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitascheroko|thitascheroko]] || [[word:jitascheroko|jitascheroko]] || [[word:shitascheroko|shitascheroko]] || [[word:kitascheroko|kitascheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutascheroko|thuthutascheroko]] || [[word:jujutascheroko|jujutascheroko]] || [[word:shushutascheroko|shushutascheroko]] || [[word:kukutascheroko|kukutascheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutascheroko|thutascheroko]] || [[word:jutascheroko|jutascheroko]] || [[word:shutascheroko|shutascheroko]] || [[word:kutascheroko|kutascheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutascheroko|thutascheroko]] || [[word:jutascheroko|jutascheroko]] || [[word:shutascheroko|shutascheroko]] || [[word:kutascheroko|kutascheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetascheroko|thetascheroko]] || [[word:jetascheroko|jetascheroko]] || [[word:shetascheroko|shetascheroko]] || [[word:ketascheroko|ketascheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotascheroko|thothotascheroko]] || [[word:jojotascheroko|jojotascheroko]] || [[word:shoshotascheroko|shoshotascheroko]] || [[word:kokotascheroko|kokotascheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotascheroko|thotascheroko]] || [[word:jotascheroko|jotascheroko]] || [[word:shotascheroko|shotascheroko]] || [[word:kotascheroko|kotascheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotascheroko|thotascheroko]] || [[word:jotascheroko|jotascheroko]] || [[word:shotascheroko|shotascheroko]] || [[word:kotascheroko|kotascheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tascheroko|th忙tascheroko]] || [[word:j忙tascheroko|j忙tascheroko]] || [[word:sh忙tascheroko|sh忙tascheroko]] || [[word:k忙tascheroko|k忙tascheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatascheroko|thathatascheroko]] || [[word:jajatascheroko|jajatascheroko]] || [[word:shashatascheroko|shashatascheroko]] || [[word:kakatascheroko|kakatascheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatascheroko|thatascheroko]] || [[word:jatascheroko|jatascheroko]] || [[word:shatascheroko|shatascheroko]] || [[word:katascheroko|katascheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatascheroko|thatascheroko]] || [[word:jatascheroko|jatascheroko]] || [[word:shatascheroko|shatascheroko]] || [[word:katascheroko|katascheroko]]
|}
